title: 30'' x 60'' Adjustable Height Bi-Fold Plastic Folding Table
features: This 30''W x 60''L Commercial Grade Bi-fold Adjustable Height Folding Table features a durable stain resistant blow molded top and sturdy frame.
The low maintenance blow molded top cleans easily.
This 5 ft. table height can be adjusted in 6'' increments from 28'' to 34'' and locks in place in a SNAP with the leg locking system for easy set-ups.
This table can be used as a temporary seating solution or set-up in a permanent location for everyday use.

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k
